target: 7. Power Outage
This is bad... it's pitch black, I can't see anything.
Sh-Shin-chan, are you nearby?
Don't worry. I'm right here.
Why did the lights go out all of a sudden?
I don't know…
(Did someone turn off the lights, or is it... a power outage?)
(For now, I need to make sure I don't get separated from Mio.)
Hold Mio's hand
Speak to Mio to calm her down
Mio, let's hold hands. It'll be a disaster if we get separated in this situation.
Ah, you're right! Then... here.
Don't let go, no matter what happens.
Yeah. I definitely won't let go.
Mio, are you okay?
I'm okay... but. I really don't like it being pitch black...
For now, let's stay still until our eyes adjust.
We should be able to see a little bit eventually.
Hehe... you're so calm, Shin-chan. You're really reliable.
(My eyes are finally getting used to the dark…)
(But what was the cause of that power outage just now?)
(For even the emergency lights to go out, it must be something major.)
Heeeey? Is someone there?
That voice… Butchi?
Yeah, probably... But don't raise your voice. There's a possibility it's a Shadow.
(Hitobuchi-sensei--commonly known as <color=#GF_TIPS_032>Butchi</color>. She's our... no, all the island kids' teacher.)
(How many years has it been since I last heard her voice?)
It's off-limits at night! If someone's there, come out right now!
What do we do, Shin-chan?
(This place is far from the shrine and the port. There's a good chance Butchi hasn't been turned into a Shadow yet, but...)
(You can never be too careful.)
Since we have no proof that that Butchi isn't a Shadow, I want to avoid making contact.
Let's hide somewhere and let her pass.
(The lockers at the back of the classroom. If we go in there...)
Mio, we're hiding in the lockers in the classroom.
Eh!? In the lockers...?
Hurry!
W-Wait, Shin-chan? Isn't it... super cramped in here?
I said don't move too much. Just bear with it for a little while.
Yeah…
Ah, the door opened. I have to close it quickly...
No, leave it open. She'll notice the sound.
Just hold your breath and stay still.
I know someone is there. Come out quickly.
(She's gotten pretty close...)
Is it here?
(It would be great if she just passed by without noticing us, but...)
Oh?
How strange. Why is the locker slightly open?
Found you...
Ugh…!
Eek!?
Oh my, if it isn't Shinpei-kun.
Is Mio-chan with you too?
I told you to come out, didn't I? That's no good. Hiding in a place like this.
Guh...!
Agah!?
Now! Get out!
Shin-chan!
Never mind that, just run!
Y-Yeah!
Ouch, ouch, ow...
It's been so long, yet you're only doing bad things. Since when did you become such a violent kid, Shinpei-kun?
(Since I can't be certain whether this Butchi is a fake or not, I want to avoid attacking the real person, but...)
Come on, I won't get mad, so come here.
(Anyway, I have to stall her!)
Uwaaaaah!
Aaaaaaaaah!!
Huh!?
(I just slammed the locker onto the floor, so why is she suffering so much?)
(No, this is no time to be thinking about that! I have to run, quick!)
Shin-chan! Thank goodness, you're safe.
Was that Butchi a Shadow?
I don't know. But if that Butchi was a Shadow, then the real one is already...

It's about time.
Let's head to the harbor.
Ah, wait. Do you hear someone running?
...They're moving away. Seems they didn't notice us.
(Was it a Shadow, or was it another survivor...?)
Maybe it's Tokiko and Sou?
It might be... But it's dangerous to go check.
For now, let's prioritize heading to the harbor. I sent them a message, so if they're safe, we should be able to meet up there.
We haven't run into anyone, huh.
Yeah... Even though it's almost time for the ferry to arrive.
...Butchi was scary earlier.
But knowing Butchi, it wouldn't be strange for her to get that mad at students sneaking into the school at night.
If we see her again, I'll have to apologize. Tell her I'm sorry for sneaking into the school without permission.
Yeah. I think she'll forgive you if you apologize properly. That's the kind of teacher Butchi was.
Yeah... She was super scary when she got mad, but she was really kind.
I'm sure she'll forgive us...
Someone's here! Mio, watch out--
Oh! You two!
Alain!?
Dad…
So this is where you were. When I got back from the restroom, no one was there, so I was really surprised.
Sounds like the ferry is leaving soon. Come on, let's head to the harbor together.
Why are you so quiet, Shinpei?
I was worried since you didn't come back no matter how long I waited. Come on, hurry up--
Stop it already.
Don't confuse me any further using the appearance and voice of someone I care about.
Shadows don't just copy humans and look exactly like them... They kill the original person and take their place.
Shinpei… what are you talking about?
Inside the house, there were traces that a Shadow had erased the original person.
That black, human-shaped stain... Isn't that the mark left behind when you erased the real Alain?
I know what you really are! Don't you dare pretend to be Alain, you fake!
I see. So that's what that stain was.

Stop!
Don't come any closer!
Okay, okay. I won't come any closer, so just hear me out.
Mio, hide behind me.
Yeah...
You're going to hear me out, right?
Yeah.
Well then, let's go over it in order from the beginning.
That was... just a little before you guys arrived.
I was cleaning up in front of the store, when I heard what sounded like a struggle coming from inside the house.
I cautiously went inside, and the next moment I saw this incredibly bright light. When I rushed into the room in a panic...
I sensed someone jumping out the open window, and that weird black stain was on the floor.
...And then?
In other words, couldn't you think of it like this?
A burglar sneaked into our place, was attacked by a Shadow that had been chasing them, and was erased...
So what Shinpei found were the traces of that burglar being erased.
You expect me to believe that!
Assuming that story is true, where did that Shadow go?! Why wasn't Alain harmed?!
Besides, you never mentioned anything about a burglar at all!
Ah, right... But back then I didn't know about the Shadows, and I didn't understand what the black stain meant either.
Plus, I didn't want to tell you a story like that and make you guys worry unnecessarily.
But thanks to Shinpei's explanation just now, I finally understand the truth of the matter.
Well, I understand why you'd be suspicious. So I'll say it again.
Shinpei, I am the genuine, real Alain.
Shin-chan…
(Considering the situation, this is definitely Shadow Alain.)
(But if by some chance, I'm wrong about this--)
Attention. The final ferry of the day bound for the mainland will soon arrive at the port.
You may have to wait until tomorrow morning for the next ferry.
Those who wish to travel to the mainland today, please proceed to the port.
Shinpei. At this point, I don't mind if you can't trust me.
But I don't want to lose any more precious family members. Come on, let's hurry to the port!
Shin-chan. I want to believe Dad.
Mio…
I mean, he hasn't tried to attack us at all.
Doesn't that mean he really is our real dad?
Take good care of Mio.
(Ushio... I... What should I do?)
If it's impossible for us to go together, we can just meet up at the port.
Hey, Shin-chan. Let's go with Dad, okay?
I want the three of us to be together.
Thank you, Mio.
